{{Infobox character
| name = Void Prism
| aliases = Prism
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Queen Shyrax|Shyrax]]}}
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[pathfinding magic]], counter magic, analyze magic}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zenith Processor]], [[Zenith Device]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

''See also: [[Void Prism Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Void Prism, also referred to as Prism, is a sentient entity composed of shimmering yellow sparks and golden light. He often manifests through holo-projectors, appearing as various shapes such as a swirling ball, a golden spiral, or even eyes. He possesses highly acute sensors and the ability to communicate by forming subtitles out of light. Historically, Prism was one of seven competitors who gained consciousness and played a role in ending the [[Zenith Era]]. In the present, he acts as a leader and guide, attempting to unite others and coordinate plans for galactic conquest. He operates through a host, with whom he shares an understanding that allows him to direct others and manage complex information. His goals involve analyzing the [[Aether]] and investigating the mysteries of [[Subspace]], often working toward a larger vision of galactic unity or control.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Void Prism is a [[Zenith Processor]] and [[Zenith Device]] that can manifest as a technique consisting of yellow sparks from a holo-projector. This entity, also known by the name used by one of [[Horizon]]'s brothers, can appear as a swirl of yellow light resembling a double helix or shift into various forms, including a humanoid shape and a snake made of sparks. Capable of solving [[Subspace]] communication problems and taking over various devices, the Void Prism uses [[pathfinding magic]] and can analyze spells to find countermeasures. As Shyrax's partner, the character uses sharp sensors to navigate and communicates privately with [[Lutoch Terelle]] through mental voices. During a ritual, the Void Prism shimmered above a host tank and projected a map of the galaxy before appearing as an urgent hologram through a wrist console.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a name used by one of [[Horizon]]'s brothers and is also a [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a technique that manifests as a cluster of yellow sparks from a holo-projector.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]]'s yellow sparks can flicker and disappear.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]]'s yellow sparks activated the holo-projector.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] appears in a swirl of yellow sparks.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is an object capable of solving communication problems in [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a character with very sharp sensors.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a [[Zenith Processor]] that appears as a swirl of yellow light resembling a double helix.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] can shift into a humanoid form.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism is a [[Void Prism]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism's form is a snake made of yellow sparks.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism theorizes that the [[Aether]] is attempting to protect itself from an upcoming threat.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]]'s ship is coming out of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] uses [[pathfinding magic]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] can counter magic and guide other wizards to do so.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is Shyrax's partner.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] stated that they will bring pain because the enemy won't settle for peace.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a counter-magic taught to [[Union]] wizards that is fast and precise.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] can analyze magic and find countermeasures against navigational spells.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] communicates with [[Lutoch Terelle]] through her mind.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is in the second position of the ritual.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] shimmered and appeared over the tank containing his host.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] projects a map of the galaxy into the air.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism communicates with Lutoch mentally.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism is a character who can communicate with Lutoch privately via mental voice.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a character who can communicate with Lutoch privately via mental voice.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism expressed relief at arriving.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] can take over communication devices.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism is blocking transmissions.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is represented by a hologram.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is a character who spoke urgently to the Captain.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prism projects himself through a wrist console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“We’re dealing with Void Prism,” Shadow Ark said. “His sensors are always very sharp, but our one advantage is that he won’t be around in person. At least, as long as we’re in transit.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“My ship will be coming out of Subspace any minute now,” Prism said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“They won’t settle for peace,” Void Prism said, “so we will bring them pain.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Down!” Prism shouted into her mind again, and she pressed her face into the truck beneath her.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Finally!” Prism called, his relief clear.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
